basic_details.job_title: Stree Nidhi Consultants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 19 Manager, Chief Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation Ltd. (Dept. of Rural Development, Govt. of Telangana)
basic_details.post_name: General Manager, Deputy General Manager, Assistant General Manager, Chief Manager, Senior Manager, Manager, Team Leader & Associate (Research & Consultancy), Senior Consultant IT
basic_details.department: Head Office, Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation Ltd., Hyderabad
basic_details.job_type: Contract Basis (Consultant) – Not a Government Job / Not a Permanent Job
basic_details.job_location: Head Office, Hyderabad, Telangana (subject to administrative exigencies)
basic_details.short_information: Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation Ltd. (Dept. of Rural Development, Govt. of Telangana) has officially announced the Consultant Recruitment 2026 with 19 openings. The detailed notification was published on 29 April 2026 at streenidhi.telangana.gov.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria as specified in the official notification and hold the required post-wise qualifications and experience can submit their applications offline by post or in person from 29 April 2026 to 20 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates
important_dates.joining deadline (after offer letter): Within one month from the date of issue of offer letter

application_fee.details: Candidates are required to pay a non-refundable application fee (including GST) as specified below. The fee must be paid through Internet Banking / NEFT / RTGS to the designated bank account. Bank transaction charges / payment gateway charges will be borne by the candidate. The UTR / transaction reference number must be specified in the application form and a copy of the transaction receipt must be enclosed with the application. | Bank Account Details for Fee Payment: | Application Fee (Post-wise)

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of notification (29/04/2026). Candidates with work experience in Rural Banking / Commercial Banking / Financial Institutions / NBFCs-MFIs are preferred. Work experience with SHG Federation / Community Based Organizations / NGOs will be an added advantage. Candidates with criminal background / disciplinary proceedings / involvement in frauds are not eligible to apply. Candidates who have already attended the interview on two earlier occasions and were not selected need not apply again. Individuals whose contract with Stree Nidhi was terminated earlier for any reason are strictly not eligible. Working knowledge in Telugu is desirable for all posts. | The detailed eligibility criteria, qualifications, age, experience, and job profile for each post are as mentioned in Annexure I of the official notification. Key details are summarized below. | Educational Qualification & Experience (Post-wise Summary)

vacancy_details.Name of the Post: Deputy General Manager – IT, MIS & Proc
Assistant General Manager – IT, MIS & Proc

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 35,822/- to Rs. 2,25,000/- per month (post-wise, as specified)

selection_process: Stage 1 Shortlisting of applications (at Stree Nidhi's discretion, ratio not exceeding 1:5)

The selection process for Stree Nidhi Consultant Recruitment 2026 consists of shortlisting followed by a Personal Interview. Only candidates shortlisted at the discretion of Stree Nidhi will be called for a personal interview in the ratio not exceeding 1:5
depending on the availability of a suitable number of candidates. The decision of Stree Nidhi regarding shortlisting and selection shall be final.

Service conditions of selected candidates will be governed by the HR policy of Stree Nidhi and the contract agreement. There will be a regular performance review and Stree Nidhi reserves the discretion to terminate the contract if performance is not found satisfactory. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview or on joining duty.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must download the Application Form (Annexure II) from the official Stree Nidhi website www.streenidhi.telangana.gov.in and submit it by post or in person to the address below. Applications must be submitted in the prescribed format only; applications in any other format will be rejected. The application form must be filled either by typing or with a Black/Blue ball point pen, clearly and legibly. The last date for receipt of applications is 20-05-2026. No application shall be entertained after the stipulated date.

Candidates must apply for any one post only. If a candidate applies for more than one position, all applications from that candidate will be rejected. The envelope must be superscribed with the Post Name and Code as: "Application for the post of [Post Name], Post Code No: ______"
The Managing Director, Stree Nidhi Credit Cooperative Federation Ltd., #4th Floor, 401 & 402, My Home Sarovar Plaza, 5-9-22/B, Secretariat Road, Saifabad, Hyderabad – 500063, Telangana
Documents to be Submitted Along with Application Form:
Duly filled Application Form (as per prescribed format)
Marks sheet and passing certificate of all Educational / Technical / Professional qualifications
Experience Certificate(s) (as per prescribed format on employer's letterhead)
Photo Identity proof and Address proof (Aadhaar / PAN)
Copy of fee payment transaction receipt with UTR / Reference Number
*Candidates are required to produce original certificates at the time of interview for verification.
important_instructions: This is a contract-based position and is neither a Government Job nor a permanent job. Candidates must apply for one post only; applications for more than one post will be rejected outright. Candidates with criminal background, disciplinary proceedings, or involvement in frauds are not eligible to apply. Candidates who have already attended the Stree Nidhi interview on two earlier occasions and were not selected need not apply again. Individuals whose contract with Stree Nidhi was previously terminated for any reason are strictly not eligible to apply. Application fee is non-refundable; incomplete applications or those without fee will be rejected. Applications must be in the prescribed format only; typed or Black/Blue pen entries only. Candidates must submit a detailed CV, experience certificates, and relieving letter (if previously employed) along with the application form. Two references (not relatives) must be provided for verification purposes. Selected candidates must join within one month from the date of issue of the offer letter. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview or on joining duty. Working knowledge in Telugu is desirable for all posts. A candidate shall not be appointed unless certified medically fit by a medical practitioner not below the rank of Assistant Civil Surgeon. Canvassing or influencing in any form will be treated as disqualification. Legal disputes, if any, will be entertained only within the jurisdiction of Hyderabad. All revisions/corrigendum will be hosted only on the official website; candidates are advised to visit regularly. The Managing Director, Stree Nidhi reserves the right to keep in abeyance or cancel the recruitment at any time without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Stree Nidhi Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications is 20 May 2026. Applications must reach by post or in person to Stree Nidhi Head Office, Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in Stree Nidhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Stree Nidhi has announced 19 consultant posts across various levels including General Manager, Deputy General Manager, Assistant General Manager, Chief Manager, Senior Manager, and Manager positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary range for Stree Nidhi Consultant posts?
faq.answer: Consolidated monthly pay ranges from ₹35,822 to ₹2,25,000 depending on the post. Team Leader and Senior Consultant IT receive the highest pay.

faq.question: Q4. Are Stree Nidhi Consultant jobs permanent?
faq.answer: No, all positions are purely contractual for 1 year (renewable based on performance review). These are not government jobs or permanent positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for Stree Nidhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline only by post or in person to Stree Nidhi Head Office, Hyderabad. No online applications accepted.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for Stree Nidhi Consultant posts?
faq.answer: Senior positions (GM, DGM, AGM, etc.): ₹885/- (incl. GST) Manager level posts: ₹590/- (incl. GST) Fee must be paid via NEFT/RTGS to SBI account.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Stree Nidhi Consultants 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves shortlisting followed by Personal Interview. Shortlisting ratio not exceeding 1:5 at Stree Nidhi's discretion.

faq.question: Q8. What qualifications are required for Stree Nidhi Consultant posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need Postgraduate qualifications (MBA, MCA, M.Tech, CA, M.Com, etc.) with relevant banking/microfinance experience. Rural banking/SHG federation experience preferred.
